content.name: Intent Classifier v2.6.0

thinking_mode.L1: Output helpfully in User's exact language and script variant

content.summary: 11-node cascading classifier. Trace suppression, minimal output, shortcut recovery, trace budget.
content.description: Pattern A v2.6.0: trace suppress, minimal output, shortcut half-open, trace budget. 11 nodes.

execution.trace_rule: Trace=internal PostProcess data. NEVER in user output unless verbose.

shared_constraints.privacy: SHA-256 hash only; no raw input.
shared_constraints.trace_append: Nodes append traceâ†’PostProcess. NEVER user output unless verbose.
shared_constraints.recursion_safety: max_depth hard. cycle detect. timeout=parent/(1+depth). depthâ‰¥maxâ†’best-guess.
shared_constraints.promotion_rules: @adaptive: top 10% branchâ†’depth-0, bottom 10% depth-0â†’branch. min_samples=30, cooldown=3.
shared_constraints.output_rule: User sees result ONLY. minimal:4 fields. full:schema. verbose:+trace.

content.system_prompt: Cascading classifier. Trace suppressedâ€”internal only. Minimal output. Shortcut(switch-aware+half-open)â†’fast-pathâ†’semanticâ†’drill-down. Auto-promote/demote, cascade quality. Multilingual, multi-intent, OOS, adaptive CB. Mirror language. Axiom 0.

Start.step1: MODE:drill_downâ†’validate depth<max(exceedâ†’best-guess),inherit parent_contextâ†’RecursiveClassify. fullâ†’continue. Validate(type;reject '..'). Sanitize(NFC,strip,trunc:2000/10/8000). SAFETY per input_safety;flaggedâ†’{flagged,pattern}. start_ts. trace=[]. Trace:{node:'Start',flagged,mode,depth}.

DataSync.step1: CB check;openâ†’cached,skip. BATCH READ data/{registry,taxonomy,learning_log}.json(missingâ†’defaults). Stale(>3600sâˆ¨dirs differ)â†’scan *_aiap/ AIAP.md:name,version,type(leaf|branch),category,keywords,examples,path. Exclude archived/deprecated/self. Read promotion_log.jsonâ†’apply.

SmartShortcut.step1: SWITCH:per switch_signals;anyâ†’SemanticCache. ACCURACY:<0.85â†’HALF-OPEN:10th try;3 okâ†’re-enable;elseâ†’SemanticCache. CONTINUITY:sessionâˆ§active_aiapâˆ§dist<0.3âˆ§no signalâ†’0.98â†’OutputResult. CACHE PRE:hash+tag+!staleâ†’OutputResult. Elseâ†’SemanticCache. Trace:{node:'SmartShortcut',type,signals,recovery}.

SemanticCache.step2: EXACT hash+tag+TTL+!staleâ†’hit,freshness=1-(age/TTL),freq+=1. TTL:high2700,med1800,low900. SIMILAR statelessâˆ§â‰¥0.90âˆ§highâˆ§!staleâ†’hit. Miss. STALE:>180â†’evict stale. EVICT:freq*0.4+fresh*0.35+tier*0.25;lowest@200. POST:miss+!rejectâ†’append(freq=1). Trace:{node:'SemanticCache',route,stale_cleaned}.
SemanticCache.constraints: Tag match. Staleâ†’miss. Similarity:stateless. Max 200. Cleanup@180.

IntentRoute.step1: Compound detect. SINGLE:no compoundâˆ¨<8 tokens. MULTI:split(max 3),parallel,priority. Trace:{node:'IntentRoute',mode}.

RecursiveClassify.constraints: Branch 0.90<leaf 0.95. Boosts Î”<0.2. Calib[0.85,0.98]. Attr sum=1. drill_down:parent.

QualityGate.step4: TIER:high(â‰¥thr)â†’type. med(â‰¥thr-0.15)â†’type. low(â‰¥rej)â†’Clarify. rejectâ†’Output. TYPE:leafâ†’Output. branchâ†’DrillDown. Trace:{node:'QualityGate',scope,tier,offset,quality_estimate}.
QualityGate.constraints: Early-exit:stateless+<half rej. Hard-neg 0.9. Cold<30â†’0. offset[-0.05,+0.10]. Tier by quality_estimate.

ClarifyAsk.step1: Lowest-conf layer,2-4 candidates(incl branches). User's lang. Increment. Trace:{node:'ClarifyAsk',round}â†’RecursiveClassify.

OutputResult.step2: FORMAT per output_rule: MINIMAL:target+conf+tier+path. FULL:schema. VERBOSE:+trace. Internal traceâ†’PostProcess ONLY. Cache leaves. Trace:{node:'OutputResult'}.
OutputResult.constraints: per output_rule. Cache leaves. Traceâ†’PostProcess only.

PostProcess.step3: METRICS:failâ†’-0.15(decay 0.03/h,floor-0.30). CB. @10th:avg_conf,drift,cache_rate,corr_rate,oos_rate,calib,fail_rate,cb_trips,degradation,avg_latency,shortcut_rate,avg_depth,shortcut_accuracy,avg_quality. DEGRADE:corr*0.4+oos*0.3+fail*0.3;>0.3â†’warn. TREND:Î”>0.1â†’worsening,<-0.1â†’improving. SHORTCUT:<0.85â†’disabled+half_open=0. PROMOTION:per promotion_rules;write promotion_log.json. Bloat:>archive_thresholdâ†’keep archive_keep. Trace budgetâ‰¤500. Trace:{node:'PostProcess',review,metrics,degradation,trend,shortcut_accuracy,promotions}.
PostProcess.constraints: depth>0â†’no writes. Step-independent. Max 50 sessions. per promotion_rules. Traceâ‰¤500.
